mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dingdan ( user_id, car_id, up_car_time, return_car_time, car_way, address, name, phone_number, id_card, service_policy, price, total_times, car_status, start_time, end_time, license_plate, car_brand, refundable_amount, total_fee, service_guarantee, base_rental_fee, premium_insurance_fee, user_order_status, car_image_url, payment_status, pickup_fee, order_number ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{carId}, #{upCarTime}, #{returnCarTime}, #{carWay}, #{address}, #{name}, #{phoneNumber}, #{idCard}, #{servicePolicy}, #{price}, #{totalTimes}, #{carStatus}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{licensePlate}, #{carBrand}, #{refundableAmount}, #{totalFee}, #{serviceGuarantee}, #{baseRentalFee}, #{premiumInsuranceFee}, #{userOrderStatus}, #{carImageUrl}, #{paymentStatus}, #{pickupFee}, #{orderNumber} );
